steps.title: Identify the documentation method
steps.content: The question asks how Wilkerson documents the Great Migration. The decisive clue is in the notes: “To document this period, Wilkerson narrates the personal journeys of Ida Mae Gladney and George Swanson Starling, among others.” This explicitly identifies her approach—creating a historical account through individual personal narratives.

steps.title: Match the method to the choices
steps.content: Choice A states that Wilkerson “chronicles the complex history...by narrating the journeys of individuals, such as Ida Mae Gladney and George Swanson Starling.” This directly shows her method: she builds a comprehensive account through personal narratives. Choices B, C, and D describe a single featured journey, celebrate achievement, or supply historical context—none capture the documentation approach of building a historical synthesis from individuals' stories. That matches choice A — A is correct.
